{ "name": "alpinejs", "version": "3.15.8", "description": "The rugged, minimal JavaScript framework", "homepage": "https://alpinejs.dev", "repository": { "type": "git", "url": "https://github.com/alpinejs/alpine.git", "directory": "packages/alpinejs" }, "author": "Caleb Porzio", "license": "MIT", "main": "dist/module.cjs.js", "module": "dist/module.esm.js", "unpkg": "dist/cdn.min.js", "dependencies": { "@vue/reactivity": "~3.1.1" } }
